articles.author: Victor Jack
articles.title: Rutte shrugs off shrinking US military presence in Europe as ‘expected’ - politico.eu
articles.description: A potential U.S. announcement to keep cutting commitments to the alliance is part of “normal business,” NATO boss Mark Rutte said.
articles.content: German Defense Minister Boris Pistorius said Wednesday: "There is still no reliable confirmation. The only thing we are hearing is that this is embedded in a decision to reduce the number of American… [+1518 chars]
